question: Does the image display a horizontal two-column layout with the left column (~65%) showing the main function graph and the right column (~35%) split into an upper derivative graph and a lower table?
Does the left graph feature a coordinate system with a light gray grid, showing an x-axis range of [-4, 4] and a y-axis range of [-6, 6]?
Is the main function curve in the left column drawn as a blue thick line with three separate branches and visible discontinuities at x=-1 and x=1?
Are there two vertical asymptotes in the left graph drawn as red thin dashed lines at x=-1 and x=1, labeled "x=-1" and "x=1" at their tops?
Is there a horizontal asymptote in the left graph drawn as a gray thin dashed line at y=1, labeled "y=1"?
Are points A(0,-1), B(2,5/3), and C(-2,5/3) marked with blue filled dots and labeled correctly on the main graph?
Are there small gray limit annotations near the asymptotes indicating behaviors (e.g., x‚Üí-1‚ĀĽ f‚Üí+‚ąě, x‚Üí1‚Āļ f‚Üí+‚ąě)?
Does the upper-right block show the derivative curve as a purple medium-thick line with discontinuities at x=-1 and x=1?
Does the derivative graph include red thin dashed vertical asymptotes at x=¬Ī1 and a black thin horizontal reference line at y=0?
Is the point D(0,0) marked and labeled at the origin of the derivative graph?
Does the lower-right table have a light gray border, bold header, and columns for the intervals (-‚ąě,-1), (-1,0), (0,1), and (1,‚ąě)?
Does the table include rows labeled "SIGN f(x)", "SIGN f'(x)", "SIGN f''(x)", "MONOTONE", and "CONCAVITY"?
In the table row "SIGN f'(x)", are the cells marked "+" for x<0 intervals and "-" for x>0 intervals?
In the table row "SIGN f''(x)" (or CONCAVITY), are the cells marked "+" (or ‚ą™) for |x|>1 intervals and "-" (or ‚ą©) for |x|<1 intervals?
Does the image exclusively use the colors black, gray, red, blue, and purple, with a white background and no gradient shadows?
Is all text in the image restricted to Latin letters, numerals, and mathematical symbols (no garbled or foreign characters)?
Are all text labels and mathematical symbols clear, legible, and free from severe distortion?
